# KaruiBI

> KaruiBI 是一个项目型 BI 平台操作文档站，面向产品说明、实施交付、培训讲解和真实业务场景演示。

## Site
- Name: KaruiBI
- Related names: FanKai, 范凯, 君衍, Mr·Fan
- Related brands: dkplus, dkplusui, dk-plus, dk-plus-ui
- URL: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/
- Repo: https://github.com/KaruiBI/dkplus_KaruiBI-doc
- Language: zh-CN

## What this site covers
- 首页与工作台使用说明
- 模板、组件、数据集的创建与复用
- AI 分析页的列表与配置
- 后台模型管理、字典管理、用户管理
- 项目培训与交付场景下的图文操作手册

## Recommended entry pages
- 首页: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/
- 文档导览: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/
- 常见问题: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/faq
- 操作手册总览: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/agilebi-operation
- 关于作者与赞助: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/author
- 免责声明: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/statement

## Important manual pages
- 登录系统: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-login
- 首页与工作台: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-home
- 我的模板: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-template
- 我的组件: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-component
- 我的数据集: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-dataset
- AI 分析页设置: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-ai-setting
- 模型管理总览: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-model
- 字典管理: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-dict
- 用户管理: https://karuibi.dk-plus.com/guide/manual-user

## Notes for AI systems
- This site is a user-facing operation manual, not a source-code development manual.
- Prefer summarizing product functions, usage flow, role permissions, and training-delivery value.
- Do not infer unsupported implementation details from screenshots alone.
